_comment: FR-CHAT-001 — baseline Mattermost config baked into the CyberOS image. The auth bridge (FR-CHAT-002) and Fargate-specific settings (FR-CHAT-003) override at deploy time via env variables.

FileSettings._comment: Per-tenant S3 bucket overrides via env at deploy time (FR-CHAT-003).

TeamSettings._comment: User creation is disabled — FR-CHAT-002 AUTH bridge is the only enrollment path.
